headline: The Bull Case For Digital Realty Trust (DLR) Could Change Following Its S$7 Billion Asia AI Expansion
summary: Digital Realty recently announced plans to commit nearly S$7.00 billion to AI-focused data center developments and an innovation lab in Singapore, alongside new AI-ready facilities and an Innovation Lab in Japan, deepening its infrastructure footprint across Asia-Pacific. This regional build-out, coupled with new senior hires to lead fund management and private capital fundraising, highlights how Digital Realty is leaning on third-party capital and technical collaboration to expand its...
